props.name: children
props.description: Declarative `CChip` children used as the initial chips. Their values seed the uncontrolled value when `defaultValue` is not provided (parity with the vanilla Chip Input).

props.name: chipClassName
props.description: Adds custom classes to chips rendered by the React Chip Input component. Accepts a static className or a resolver function based on chip value.

props.name: className
props.description: Adds custom classes to the React Chip Input component root element.

props.name: createOnBlur
props.description: Creates a new chip when the React Chip Input component loses focus with a pending value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Sets the initial uncontrolled values rendered by the React Chip Input component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the React Chip Input component and prevents adding, removing, or selecting chips.

props.name: filter
props.description: Renders the chips as filter chips, each showing a leading check icon while selected. Implies `selectable`.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the `id` of the internal text input rendered by the React Chip Input component.

props.name: label
props.description: Renders an inline label inside the React Chip Input component container.

props.name: maxChips
props.description: Sets the maximum number of chips that can be created in the React Chip Input component.

props.name: name
props.description: Sets the name of the hidden input used by the React Chip Input component for form submission.

props.name: onAdd
props.description: Callback fired when the React Chip Input component adds a new chip.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the value list of the React Chip Input component changes.

props.name: onInput
props.description: Callback fired when the internal text input value changes in the React Chip Input component.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Callback fired when the React Chip Input component removes a chip.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when the selected chip values change in the React Chip Input component.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Sets placeholder text for the internal input of the React Chip Input component.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Makes the React Chip Input component readonly while keeping values visible.

props.name: removable
props.description: Displays remove buttons on chips managed by the React Chip Input component.

props.name: selectable
props.description: Enables chip selection behavior in the React Chip Input component.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Sets how many chips can be selected at once in the React Chip Input component.

props.name: separator
props.description: Sets the separator character used to create chips while typing or pasting in the React Chip Input component.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the React Chip Input component to small or large.

props.name: value
props.description: Controls the values rendered by the React Chip Input component.
